skills.name: password-generator
skills.description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords in the browser. Supports length, character types, bulk generation, and ambiguous character exclusion.

skills.name: qr-code-generator
skills.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, Wi-Fi, email, phone, and vCard contacts. Outputs PNG and SVG. Includes real-time scannability scoring.

skills.name: text-case-converter
skills.description: Convert text between 12 case formats including camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, Title Case and more.

skills.name: time-zone-converter
skills.description: Convert times across multiple timezones with DST indicators, meeting overlap grid, and shareable team clock board.

skills.name: Time Zone Converter
skills.description: Convert times across multiple time zones with DST awareness, meeting overlap grid, and shareable team clock URLs.

skills.name: Text Case Converter
skills.description: Convert text between 15 case formats including Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, Slugify and more, with Find & Replace and Custom Terms Override.

skills.name: color-picker
skills.description: Visually pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL. Includes WCAG contrast checker and palette generator.

skills.name: Color Picker & HEX RGB HSL Converter
skills.description: Convert between HEX, RGB and HSL color formats. Generate harmonious palettes, check WCAG contrast ratios, and save color history.
